bug_report.summary: Application Menu: Zoom controls rendering changed (Zoom Out icon appears missing/blank or shifted)
steps_to_reproduce: Look at the Zoom controls row near the bottom of the menu.
expected_behaviors: Zoom controls in the Application Menu render normally, with clearly visible Zoom Out (−), current zoom (e.g., 100%), and Zoom In (+) controls aligned and with their icons visible.
actual_behaviors: After the change, the Zoom controls row’s rendering differs; the Zoom Out (−) control/icon appears to be missing/blank or shifted compared to before (layout/icon rendering changed in the app menu).

bug_report.summary: Application Menu lower section row styling/arrow alignment changes near Settings/More tools
steps_to_reproduce: Look at the lower menu items around “Settings” and “More tools” (including the submenu arrow indicator).
expected_behaviors: Menu rows in the lower section (Settings/More tools) should keep consistent padding and arrow alignment with the previous build.
actual_behaviors: Visual differences are present in the Settings/More tools area (diff regions 5, 6, 14), suggesting changed padding and/or submenu arrow positioning not covered by the stated intent.
